compat_warnings: Hybrid SSM/Mamba bundle does not report fp16 state passthrough metadata; vMLX applies a runtime grouped-Conv1d layout backstop, but direct mlx_lm users should re-convert with a newer jang build.

issues: config expects MTP next-token prediction layers, but the bundle index has no mtp.* tensors
